resolved_requirements.core_objective: hit the ball back and forth
resolved_requirements.win_condition: score a certain number of points
resolved_requirements.lose_condition: allow the ball to pass your paddle
resolved_requirements.sound: simple sound effects for hits and scores

plan.game_concept: A simple 2D game where the player controls a spaceship to dodge incoming asteroids and collect stars for points.
plan.framework_rationale: Simple mechanics achievable with Canvas API; fewer dependencies = more reliable generation

core_mechanics.name: Dodge
core_mechanics.description: The player must move the spaceship left and right to avoid incoming asteroids.

core_mechanics.name: Collect
core_mechanics.description: The player can collect stars for points.

game_loop.init_description: Initialize game variables, create player and asteroid entities, and set up the canvas.
game_loop.update_description: Update the positions of the player and asteroids, check for collisions, and update the score.
game_loop.render_description: Clear the canvas and redraw the player, asteroids, and score on each frame.

entities.name: Player
entities.description: The spaceship controlled by the player.

entities.name: Asteroid
entities.description: Falling obstacles that the player must avoid.

entities.name: Star
entities.description: Items that the player can collect for points.

entity_relationships: Player collides with Asteroids to lose
plan.difficulty_curve: Increase asteroid spawn rate over time.
plan.js_architecture: All game logic in a single script file, handling initialization, game loop, and event listeners.
acceptance_checks: Player can move left and right using arrow keys
Asteroids spawn and move down the screen
Stars spawn randomly and can be collected for points
Collision detection works correctly between player and asteroids
Game resets correctly after a game over

game_files.index.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Space Dodger</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
</head>
<body>
    <canvas id="gameCanvas" width="800" height="600"></canvas>
    <script src="game.js"></script>
</body>
</html>
game_files.style.css:
body { margin: 0; background-color: black; }
canvas { background-color: #eee; display: block; margin: 0 auto; }

repair_instructions: [MAJOR] The game does not implement the star collectible feature as described in the game plan. in game.js
[MAJOR] The player is not able to move left or right as per the controls defined in the game plan. The only movement implemented is jumping. in game.js

[MAJOR] The player starts at a y-coordinate of 300, which is not the intended starting position as per the game plan (y: 500). This may cause the player to appear off-screen or not in the expected position. in game.js
